jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - 1mg - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
1mg invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About 1mg:
1mg is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg!
